rows.label: qev018601_MSG0001
rows.name:
Welcome-welcome! Welcome to the
Shining Erudition Hall, mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev018601_MSG0002
rows.name:
If you have any leftover Miranium,
please ask to exchange it for
cash via the Quest Board, mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev018601_MSG0003
rows.name:
If you do, you Earthlings get
lots of money, and Mee-mee gets
money and is very happy, mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev018601_MSG0004
rows.name: It's a win-win, mo! How about it, mo?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev018601_JNK0010
rows.name: Interest

rows.label: qev018601_SEL0011
rows.name: Ask in detail about how she makes a profit.

rows.label: qev018601_JNK0020
rows.name: Doubt

rows.label: qev018601_SEL0021
rows.name: Suspect that she might be up to no good.

rows.label: qev018601_MSG0005
rows.name:
If you say that, Mee-mee
will get very angry, mo?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev018601_MSG0006
rows.name:
Maybe you should take it back
before I get really angry, mo?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev018601_MSG0007
rows.name: You want to know Mee-mee's alchemy, mo?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev018601_MSG0008
rows.name:
Hmmm... It's a corporate secret,
but maybe I can tell you if you
become a special member, mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev018601_MSG0009
rows.name:
How about it? Right now, you can join
just by bringing some Arc Sand Ore, mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev018601_MSG0010
rows.name:
And if you become a special member of
the Shining Erudition Hall, the Miranium
exchange rate goes up too, mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev018601_MSG0011
rows.name:
It's a great deal, right? You should
definitely try challenging it, mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev018601_MSG0012
rows.name:
Oh! I'll be waiting for the
Arc Sand Ore then, mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev018601_MSG0013
rows.name:
Let's make lots of money
together at the Shining Erudition
Hall and become happy, mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev018601_MSG0014
rows.name:
I'll tell you the corporate secret
of the Shining Erudition Hall if
you become a special member, mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev018601_MSG0015
rows.name:
The Miranium exchange rate
will go up too, so hurry and
get the Arc Sand Ore, mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev018601_MSG0016
rows.name:
Welcome-welcome! Welcome to the
Shining Erudition Hall, mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev018601_MSG0017
rows.name:
...Oh? Are you a customer
looking to join, mo?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev018601_MSG0018
rows.name:
Did you get the Arc Sand Ore,
mo? If so, please show me, mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev018601_MSG0019
rows.name: Oh! Great![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev018601_MSG0020
rows.name:
With this, I can make the
Alchemy Mech even bigger and
profits will go up and up, mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev018601_MSG0021
rows.name:
Thank you! With this, you're now a member
of the Shining Erudition Hall, mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev018601_MSG0022
rows.name:
With this, the Miranium exchange
rate at our company goes up![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev018601_MSG0023
rows.name:
It also comes with the wonderful service
of enjoying a wonderful chat with
Mee-mee, the Ma-non alchemist, mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev018601_MSG0024
rows.name:
Yes! Mee-mee's big service
right away! I'll teach you
whatever you want to know, mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev018601_JNK0030
rows.name: Interest

rows.label: qev018601_SEL0031
rows.name: Ask in detail about how she makes a profit.

rows.label: qev018601_JNK0040
rows.name: Consultation

rows.label: qev018601_SEL0041
rows.name: Seek life advice on how to live on Mira from now on.

rows.label: qev018601_MSG0025
rows.name:
When you toss Miranium into the Super
Alchemy Mech that Mee-mee developed, mo...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev018601_MSG0026
rows.name:
It changes into a whole bunch
of other resources, mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev018601_MSG0027
rows.name:
For example, it can even
produce gold and silver, mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev018601_MSG0028
rows.name:
So even if I pay you money, as
long as I have Miranium, I can
get even more money, mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev018601_MSG0029
rows.name:
Amazing, right? That's why
Mee-mee is an alchemist, mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev018601_MSG0030
rows.name:
Hmmm... that might be outside
Mee-mee's area of expertise, mo?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev018601_MSG0031
rows.name:
Ah, but since you became a special member of the
Shining Erudition Hall, you should definitely be
able to get lots of money and be happy, mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev018601_MSG0032
rows.name:
By the way, right now you
are a Bronze member, mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev018601_MSG0033
rows.name:
If you listen to more and more
of Mee-mee's requests, you can
become a Silver member, mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev018601_MSG0034
rows.name:
If you become a Silver member, the exchange
rate will go up even more, so please do
your best to fulfill my requests, mo![ST:wait ]
